sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Aw lawmte aw, dial pei en un, vantunga a khai;
Hong huh ding Mangpa hong kuan ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Galdo-in tu’n ka hong pai ding!
A thupha tawh om tawntung ning,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thahatte kim khat sizo a, hanna bei dekta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong uk Mangpa a minpha tawh

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Galkapna sawtvei haksa a, huhna hong nai hi;
